sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sequences (id INT, sequence_name VARCHAR(100));
SELECT sequence_remove((SELECT sequence_name || '_suffix' FROM test_sequences WHERE id = 1));
SELECT sequence_next((SELECT sequence_name || '_prefix' FROM test_sequences WHERE id = 2));
SELECT id, sequence_name || '_' || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_sequences) AS modified_name FROM test_sequences;
WITH sequence_data AS (SELECT sequence_name FROM test_sequences WHERE id = 1) SELECT sequence_remove((SELECT sequence_name FROM sequence_data) || '_temp') AS removed_sequence;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, sequence_next((sequence_name || '_altered')::VARCHAR) AS next_value FROM test_sequences) AS subquery WHERE next_value > 0;
